parents.subject: LU-16518 llite: implicit truncation to a one-bit field

commit.subject: LU-16518 ptlrpc: fix incompatible function type warnings
commit.message:
LU-16518 ptlrpc: fix incompatible function type warnings

Fix errors of the type:

lustre/ptlrpc/layout.c:971:2: error: cast from
  'void (*)(struct mgs_target_info *)' to
  'void (*)(void *)' converts to incompatible
  function type [-Werror,-Wcast-function-type-strict]
  971 |         DEFINE_MSGF("mgs_target_info", 0, sizeof(struct mgs_target_info),
      |         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  972 |                     lustre_swab_mgs_target_info, NULL);
      |                     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

by using union magic.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I8418b0a1e6184c37e0eba9131121a1268edf300d
